// LevelReq: Base character level for the next enlightenment; effective level required also adds Enlightenment * LevelReqPerEnlightenment.
// LevelReqPerEnlightenment: Extra required levels per enlightenment already completed (1 => 275, then 276, 277, ...).
// MaxEnlightenments: 0 = unlimited enlightenments; set > 0 to cap (must stay below cap to attempt another).
// RequireSocietyMaster: When true, society master is required only from SocietyMasterRequirementFromEnlightenment onward (1-based enlightenment number).
// RequireAllLuminanceAuras: When true, lum-aug tier sum gate applies only from LumAugRequirementFromEnlightenment onward.
// SocietyMasterRequirementFromEnlighten: First enlightenment number (1-based) that requires society master (default 26 => after 25 completed).
// LumAugRequirementFromEnlightenment: First enlightenment number (1-based) that requires lum-aug tiers (default 11 => after 10 completed).
// RemoveSociety: If true, strip society standing on enlightenment (endless defaults leave society intact).
// RemoveLuminance: If true, strip luminance investment on enlightenment.
// RemoveAetheria: If true, strip aetheria on enlightenment.
// RemoveAttributes: If true, reset attributes on enlightenment.
// RemoveSkills: If true, reset skills on enlightenment.
// RemoveLevel: If true, reset level on enlightenment.
// SkillCreditAmount: Skill credits granted each time: (Enlightenment / SkillCreditInterval) * SkillCreditAmount (integer division).
// SkillCreditInterval: Divisor paired with SkillCreditAmount for per-enlightenment skill credits (integer division; must be > 0 for grants).
// SkipNormalBroadcast: If true, skip the three personal enlightenment broadcast lines to the player.
// SkipResetCertificate: If true, do not grant the attribute reset certificate from the NPC emote.
// MaxLumBase: Sets MaximumLuminance to this plus (Enlightenment * MaxLumPerEnlightenment); long.MaxValue = effectively no cap.
// MaxLumPerEnlightenment: Added to max luminance cap per enlightenment count (0 = no growth per enlightenment).
// PatchWieldRequirements: When true, load Harmony patches for ItemWieldRequirementEnlightenments (FakeInt) on wield checks.
// EnlightenmentRequiresConfirmation: If true, /enlighten and /enl show a client Yes/No confirmation before applying enlightenment.
// AllowEnlightenmentViaEnlightenmentObj: If true, WCID 53412 may still start enlightenment (vanilla object). Command flow works regardless.
// SuppressAllegiancePassupXpAfterEnligh: If true, for AllegiancePassupXpSuppressMinutes after each enlightenment, ShareType.Allegiance GrantXP to this player is zeroed (vassal pass-up pause).
// AllegiancePassupXpSuppressMinutes: Duration of pass-up suppression; 0 disables the window registration.
// BaseLumAugmentationsRequired: Minimum sum of LumAug* tier counts across configured properties (not raw luminance currency).
// LumAugmentationsRequiredPerEnlightenm: Extra required tier sum per current enlightenment (0 keeps a flat threshold while the gate is active).
// RequireMinimumPerLumAugContributor: If true, every lum-aug contributor line must be at least LumAugMinimumPerContributor (stricter than sum-only).
// LumAugMinimumPerContributor: Minimum per line when RequireMinimumPerLumAugContributor is true.
// ShowLumAugVerificationCounts: If true, on lum-aug failure also send tier sum vs required (tuning aid).
